hero.badge: ✦ Now in early access — 10 founding spots
hero.subheadline: The simplest changelog tool for indie makers. Beautiful public page, embeddable widget, automatic email notifications.
hero.urgency: 🔥 First 10 signups get 1 month Pro free — 7 spots left
hero.mockupEntry1Desc: Install our 'What's New' badge in your app. Users click to see all recent updates.
hero.mockupEntry2Desc: Your changelog lives at yourapp.com/changelog. Beautiful, brandable, fast.
hero.mockupEntry3Desc: Every update sent to subscribers automatically. Zero config required.

problem.title: You've tried everything.
problem.subtitle: None of it works for indie makers.
problem.card1Desc: No updates since 2020. Your users deserve better.
problem.card2Desc: That's more than most indie MRR. Absurd.
problem.card3Desc: A Google Doc dressed up. Not a product.

solution.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
solution.feature1Desc: A beautiful, public page at yourapp.com/changelog. Chronological, filterable, brandable.
solution.feature2Desc: A 'What's New' badge in your app. Users click, they see updates. Install in 2 minutes.
solution.feature3Desc: Every update sent to subscribers automatically. No Mailchimp. No setup.
solution.feature4Desc: Connect GitHub → releases auto-generate changelog drafts. Review and publish in 1 click.

howItWorks.title: From zero to shipped in 3 steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up, name your project, and get your public changelog URL instantly.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Use our editor to craft a beautiful changelog entry. Add tags, version numbers, and media.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Subscribers receive a beautiful email. Your widget updates. Your changelog is live.

earlyAccess.title: Be a Founding Member
earlyAccess.subtitle: The first 10 people who join shape what Logstory becomes.
earlyAccess.perk1: 1 month Pro free, no questions asked
earlyAccess.perk2: Direct access to the builder (that's me)
earlyAccess.perk3: Your feedback ships in days, not quarters
earlyAccess.perk4: "Founding Member" badge forever on your profile

waitlistForm.success: You're on the list! Check your inbox.
